description: A minimal standalone program that prints one line of text and exits -- structurally identical to the hello-world pattern (same template). Kept as its own pattern_ref because the validated dataset and Cell 8-11 test suite both refer to this specific shape as the 'program declares an entry point with no other declarations' case (e.g. Tier1/Tier8), separate from the general-purpose hello-world label.

message.desc: the exact text to print -- inserted inside the quotes as-is

common_mistakes: Do not add a second `print` or any statement after the one shown.
example:
program SqrtDemo
    print the text "Enter a number: " and newline
end program
